name: Modal

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Centered overlay dialog for confirmations and forms
Destructive action confirmation with danger button

representativeVariants.name: Default Modal
representativeVariants.whySelected: Standard dialog — dark overlay, elevated surface, header + body + footer
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header: title '编辑用户' (font-size h4, font-weight semibold) + close button (ghost, x icon); Body: form with '用户名' input and '角色' select, padding var(--space-5); Footer: secondary button '取消' + primary button '保存', gap var(--space-3), justify end, border-top 1px solid var(--color-border), padding var(--space-4) var(--space-5)

representativeVariants.name: Confirmation Modal
representativeVariants.whySelected: Destructive confirmation — compact dialog with danger button
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header: title '确认删除'; Body: text '确定要删除该用户吗？此操作无法撤销。' (color var(--color-muted-foreground)); Footer: secondary button '取消' + danger button '删除', gap var(--space-3), justify end

anatomy.description: Full-screen semi-transparent dark backdrop, fixed position, center modal
Title + close button, padding var(--space-4) var(--space-5), border-bottom 1px solid var(--color-border)
Action buttons, padding var(--space-4) var(--space-5), border-top 1px solid var(--color-border), justify end

structurePatterns: Overlay: fixed inset 0, flex center, z-index 1000
Modal: flex column, max-height 80vh, overflow auto on body
Header: flex row, justify between, align center
Footer: flex row, justify end, gap var(--space-3)

bestPractices: Modal width sm (400px) for confirmations, md (480px) for forms
Always include close button in header
Footer actions: secondary left, primary/danger right

doNotInvent: Drawer/slide-over panel (not in spec — use modal)
keyInsightSeed: Dark overlay with elevated surface, sharp header separator
